Bash(TOKEN="sbp_f1efbd6c8217dda83111536a695b5786a80b3ea2"

curl -s "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/ojoiauodnmozufqtlkrv/database/query" \\
  -X POST \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "query": "DELETE FROM sales WHERE session_store_id IN \(SELECT ss.id FROM session_stores ss JOIN route_sessions rs ON ss.route_session_id = rs.id WHERE rs.session_date < '\\''2026-03-01'\\'' OR rs.session_date > '\\''2026-04-30'\\''\); DELETE FROM session_stores WHERE route_session_id IN \(SELECT id FROM route_sessions WHERE session_date < '\\''2026-03-01'\\'' OR session_date > '\\''2026-04-30'\\''\); DELETE FROM route_sessions WHERE session_date < '\\''2026-03-01'\\'' OR session_date > '\\''2026-04-30'\\'';"
  }')
